about_bio: Born in Istanbul on October 10, 1997. I embarked on my hairdressing career at a young age and have been in this profession for over 16 years. Throughout this journey, I developed my skills working in different salons, and by managing salons for approximately 7 years, I gained expertise in the industry not only as a practitioner but also from a management perspective.
about_bio2: In the later stages of my career, I gained partnership experience and, by bringing together all the knowledge, expertise, and vision I have acquired, I have been serving clients in my own salon since 2023.
about_bio3: I have specialized in women's hair design, particularly in color transformations, blonde tones, special occasions, hair extensions, and modern techniques. I believe that every client has a unique personal style, and with every service I provide, I aim to bring out this individuality.
about_bio4: For me, this profession is not merely about doing hair; it is about making a difference in every person I touch and helping them feel stronger and more confident.
about_bio5: As Fatih Kurt, my goal is to transcend standards, offer each client a personalized experience, and leave a lasting impression with every service I provide.
about_vision_text: To be an innovative and inspiring brand that makes a difference in the beauty industry.
about_vision_text2: As Fatih Kurt Hair Artist, our goal is to become a brand that sets trends in the industry, not just in our region, but stands out with its quality and style. We aim to consistently apply the most current techniques and provide our clients with an experience beyond the ordinary.
about_mission_text: To provide quality and reliable service to every client that makes them feel special.
about_mission_text2: Prioritizing hair health, creating personalized solutions and ensuring maximum satisfaction in every service is our greatest priority. Through our genuine approach and professional perspective, we ensure that everyone who leaves our salon feels stronger and more confident.
af_model_text: We determine the style that suits you best together and apply it meticulously.
af_glow_text: The most current techniques and highest quality products to achieve your dream color.
af_health_text: Special care for healthy and shiny hair from root to tip, from inside out.
af_online_text: Booking and service purchases from our online platform, anytime, anywhere.

shop_hero_desc: Bring professional hair care home. Carefully curated products by Fatih Kurt.
shop_tip1_title: How to Choose the Right Shampoo?
shop_tip1_desc: Selecting shampoo according to your hair type is the foundation of healthy hair. Choose sulfate-free formulas for colored hair and balancing formulas for oily hair.
shop_tip2_title: When Should You Use a Hair Mask?
shop_tip2_desc: A weekly hair mask treatment nourishes your hair deeply. Leave the mask on for 10-15 minutes before rinsing for optimal results.
shop_tip3_title: How to Protect Your Hair Color?
shop_tip3_desc: Do not wash your hair for 48 hours after coloring. Rinsing with cool water slows color fading. Using a color-protective shampoo is essential.
shop_tip4_desc: Always apply heat protectant before using a blow dryer, straightener, or curling iron. This simple step keeps your hair much healthier in the long run.
shop_tip5_desc: Healthy hair comes from a healthy scalp. A weekly scalp massage increases blood circulation and supports hair growth.
review_1: A hairdresser of the highest quality where you can trust with your eyes closed and receive exceptional service. They restored my damaged hair to its former health with their wonderful care. I extend my sincere gratitude once again to Fatih.
review_2: They offer a successful experience with quality service and professional perspective. This is a place where you'll get what you expect and leave satisfied.
review_3: You can go without hesitation, I was very pleased with my hair. Thank you for your efforts.
review_4: I've been going to salons for 18 years. I'm very happy with the ombre cut and everything else—blessings on your hands. Fatih is wonderful; you can choose him for beautiful blonde colors.
review_5: We were very pleased; both my and my friend's hair turned out perfect, exactly as we wanted. We finally found the hairdresser we were looking for. Thank you very much to Fatih and his team.
review_6: A hairdresser I've been visiting for years and always leave satisfied. I especially recommend him to everyone for ombre work. Blessings on your hands and efforts.
review_7: The hairdresser I've trusted with my hair for years; we're so glad you exist. They worked on my hair for nearly 12 hours without losing their smile, thank you very much.
review_8: Service and people who deserve every penny they receive. Once you know what you want, there's no question of being unsatisfied. Blessings on your hands and efforts.
review_9: I'm very grateful to Fatih, İsa, and the team for completely restoring my unhealthy hair and achieving the color I wanted. Smiling, genuine, and warm-hearted—every woman should visit at least once to see the difference.
review_10: A hairdresser I've been visiting for many years and always leave delighted. Thank you.
review_11: I had micro extensions done on my hair. The color and craftsmanship were absolutely beautiful, I was very satisfied, and I definitely recommend it.
review_12: Excellent in both cutting and coloring. You can entrust your hair to them with your eyes closed.
review_13: I had my hair lightened and colored, and additionally had a botox treatment. I definitely recommend it; I was really very satisfied, and I'm especially grateful for their attention and care.
review_14: Excellent in both cutting and coloring. You can entrust your hair to them with your eyes closed.
review_15: A professional team, your work is excellent, blessings on your efforts.
